message:
feat(ops): add API transport-boundary trigger detection to drift checker

Expand the tokio drift checker into a broader async boundary guard. New
check_api_transport_boundary_trigger() scans src/api/** for patterns
like axum::Router, hyper::Server, tonic::transport::Server, and
TcpListener::bind() indicating a real transport boundary that should
trigger re-evaluation of deferred Asupersync request-region work.
Includes comment/test-context exclusion, exception marker support, and
comprehensive tests. Report header renamed to Async Boundary Guard.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
